data.current_description: Retrieves data from all Content Types.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all Content Types available in the specified CMS project. Returns a list of content type definitions including their identifiers, names, and metadata. This operation is useful for discovering the structure and available content types within your Headless CMS project.
data.reasoning: The current description is too vague and lacks context about what data is returned. Added clarification about the project scope, return value structure, and use case to help AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'GetPagesbyContentType' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. The current description lacks detail about pagination, filtering capabilities, and return structure. Enhanced description clarifies the paginated nature of results, mentions query parameter support, and explains the use case for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Get all CMS pages by content type
data.current_description: Gets data from all pages of a given content type.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all CMS pages of a specified content type within a project. Returns a paginated list of page documents including their identifiers, status, and content. Supports filtering and pagination through query parameters. Use this operation to fetch multiple pages sharing the same content type structure.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks detail about pagination, filtering capabilities, and return structure. Enhanced description clarifies the paginated nature of results, mentions query parameter support, and explains the use case for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'GetCMSpage' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Both summary and description are too generic. The summary doesn't specify that it retrieves a single page by ID. The description lacks context about what constitutes 'all data' and the use case. Improved summary clarifies the single-page retrieval action, and enhanced description specifies the return structure and typical use cases.

data.current_description: Gets all data from a given page.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific CMS page by document ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves complete data for a specific CMS page identified by its document ID and content type. Returns the full page document including all fields, metadata, status, and content. This operation is used to fetch detailed information about a single page for rendering or editing purposes.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description are too generic. The summary doesn't specify that it retrieves a single page by ID. The description lacks context about what constitutes 'all data' and the use case. Improved summary clarifies the single-page retrieval action, and enhanced description specifies the return structure and typical use cases.
